# Hermes Agent v0.13.0 (v2026.5.7)

**Release Date:** May 7, 2026
**Since v0.12.0:** Incremental improvements, bug fixes, and new provider support.

## ✨ Highlights

- Expanded model catalog with latest provider releases
- Improved context compression and memory management
- Gateway stability improvements across messaging platforms
- Performance optimizations for long-running sessions
- Additional tool guardrails and safety improvements
